rate_note: Blended commercial rate from last 12 utility bills.

Gym.active_note: Main court lights, scoreboard, bleacher area HVAC, and locker-room load while a game or practice is running.

volleyball.session_note: Each match night runs warmups, two matches, and teardown -- about 3.5 hours of full gym load.

basketball.session_note: Practice plus game runs about 3 hours of full gym load.
